title: Aggressive Mobs
description: Simply put: all mobs are aggressive towards you now.
body:
# Aggressive Mobs

This Fabric mod makes all creatures in Minecraft aggressive, including passive ones like cows and pigs. Be careful, the world has become a much more dangerous place!

## Features

*   **Universal Aggression:** All creatures that are not normally hostile (except monsters, which already are) will now attack players on sight.
*   **Highly Configurable:** You can adjust the behavior of aggressive creatures using game rules.

## Game Rules

You can modify these game rules using the `/gamerule <ruleName> <value>` command.

*   `aggressiveMobsActivated` (default: `false`)
    *   Activates or deactivates the main functionality of the mod. Set to `true` to make creatures aggressive.
*   `aggressiveMobsSpeedPercentage` (default: `160`)
    *   Modifies the movement speed of aggressive creatures. 100% is normal speed.
*   `aggressiveMobsDamagePercentage` (default: `100`)
    *   Modifies the damage dealt by aggressive creatures. 100% is normal damage. (for mobs that do not have an attack attribute, it deals, at 100%, 1 heart of damage)
*   `aggressiveMobsKnockbackPercentage` (default: `100`)
    *   Modifies the knockback dealt by aggressive creatures. 100% is normal knockback.
*   `aggressiveMobsFollowRangePercentage` (default: `100`)
    *   Modifies the distance at which aggressive creatures will detect and pursue you. 100% is the normal range.

## Installation

1.  Make sure you have [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/) installed.
2.  Download the mod's `.jar` file.
3.  Place the `.jar` file in your `mods` folder.

Have fun (and try to survive)!
